docs.title: Ifeanyi A. -  Sysadmin & Support Engineer
docs.text:
LinkedIn · Contact

I’m the person you call when things break, and the one working behind the scenes to make sure they don’t. Over the 𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘁 𝘆𝗲𝗮𝗿𝘀, I’ve navigated everything from small retail business tech support to enterprise-level helpdesks and system administration to complex server and user environments.

As a 𝗦𝘆𝘀𝗔𝗱𝗺𝗶𝗻 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗦𝘂𝗽𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿 for 3 years now, I’ve learned that great IT is about more than just uptime; it’s about making sure technology actually makes sense for the people using it. I enjoy the puzzle of a deep-system dive just as much as I enjoy translating a complex technical fix into plain English. Whether I’m stabilizing infrastructure or untangling a tricky support ticket, my goal is always the same: keep the systems running fast and the users feeling supported.

Foundations | Retail Support & Customer Experience ---- Growth | IT Helpdesk | System Administration & Support Engineering

docs.title: 𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗜 𝗯𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴:
docs.text:
• A calm head when things get technical.
  • An obsession with fixing the root cause, not just the symptom.
  • A belief that "IT should be a bridge, not a bottleneck".

docs.title: 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹:
docs.text:
1. 𝗢𝗦: Windows, Windows Server, Linux
  2. 𝗛𝗮𝗿𝗱𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲: Dell/HP Servers, Dell/HP/Lenovo, AlienWare workstations, Cisco devices, Synology.
  3. 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵: Active Directory, IAM, Office 365, Virtualization (VMware/Hyper-V, VMware, Proxmox)
  4. 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 & 𝗖𝗹𝗼𝘂𝗱: Docker, Podman, AWS, Azure
  5. 𝗢𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀: Git, Bash, Incident management, RCA, DR, Documentation

docs.title: About Me
docs.text:
Hey there! I'm Ifeanyi, and I've got a pretty interesting journey that's taken me from retail shelves to server rooms.

I spent 6 years in retail, working my way up from shelf attendant to store supervisor. But here's the thing, I was always the person my colleagues turned to when something went wrong with the computers. So after realizing that's where my real passion was, I went back to school and got my degree in Computer Science.

That led me to an educational organization where I started as an IT Helpdesk Intern on contract, then Technical support. Within a few months, I landed a full-time role as a system administrator and I've been thriving there for the past 3 years.

So whether you're wondering why I switched careers or just want to chat about tech, IT infrastructure, or even retail stories, I'm here for it. All told, I've got atleast 9 years of work experience (retail and IT combined) under my belt, and I'm still learning something new every day.

docs.title: Get in Touch
docs.text:
Got a question? Want to collaborate? Just want to say hi? I'd love to hear from you.

  • Email: asonyejude@gmail.com
  • LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/ifeanyi-asonye

Feel free to reach out anytime — I genuinely enjoy connecting with people!

docs.title: 2. Enterprise Systems Administration & Cloud Support
docs.text:
Description: Managed and supported a hybrid data center + public cloud environment for a global application, focusing on reliability, incident response, and end-user support.

Key Features: - Windows and Linux systems deployment, patching, and configuration management (Ansible) - 24/7 incident coordination using ServiceNow and Slack - Capacity planning, cost monitoring, and rightsizing with AWS Cost Explorer and Azure Advisor - Security hardening, vulnerability scanning (Qualys), and SOC integration
